summary: Post-offline-revert stability testing completed. CRITICAL BUG FIXED: Removed undefined 'setIsOfflineSession' call in AuthContext.js that would have caused JavaScript errors. All core features verified working: Login with PIN 10000, Dashboard loads with sales data (not stuck on spinner), Tables page loads with table map, Order screen loads with products and categories, Adding items to orders works, Navigation between pages works with smooth transitions. NO critical JavaScript errors (getSyncQueueCount, ChunkLoadError, undefined) detected. PWA features verified: manifest.json accessible with correct fields, sw.js accessible, HTML has translate='no' and lang='es' and meta google notranslate.

test_results.login_with_pin_10000: PASS - Login works, navigates to dashboard
test_results.dashboard_loads: PASS - KPI cards visible, no spinner stuck
test_results.tables_page_loads: PASS - Table map visible with tables
test_results.order_screen_loads: PASS - Categories (HAMBURGUESA, CERVEZAS) and products visible
test_results.add_item_to_order: PASS - Product modal with modifiers, AGREGAR button works
test_results.send_to_kitchen: PASS - ENVIAR button visible and functional
test_results.page_navigation: PASS - Dashboard ↔ Tables ↔ Order screen transitions smooth
test_results.dashboard_return: PASS - Can navigate back to dashboard
test_results.no_js_errors: PASS - No getSyncQueueCount, ChunkLoadError, or undefined errors

backend_apis.GET /api/system/config: 200 OK - Config with currency, restaurant_name, etc.
backend_apis.POST /api/auth/login: 200 OK - Returns token and user data

pwa_files.manifest.json: PASS - short_name: VexlyPOS, display: standalone, 2 icons, lang: es-DO
pwa_files.sw.js: PASS - Service worker v2 accessible with network-first strategy
pwa_files.index.html: PASS - translate='no', lang='es', meta google notranslate

bugs_fixed.issue: setIsOfflineSession(false) called but never defined - would cause 'setIsOfflineSession is not defined' error
bugs_fixed.fix: Removed the undefined function call on line 191

critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.js had a leftover setIsOfflineSession call from offline code that was never defined - FIXED
offlineDB.js correctly implements simplified IndexedDB with only getSyncQueueCount, syncWithServer, cacheEssentialData, cleanupSyncedData
App.js correctly uses QueryClientProvider without ConnectionStatus or OfflineProvider
Dashboard.js uses standard fetch without offline detection
OrderScreen.js uses standard ordersAPI calls without offline wrappers
TableMap.js uses standard fetch without offline fallback
Layout.js correctly wraps Outlet with framer-motion AnimatePresence for page transitions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Post-offline-revert testing completed successfully. The app is stable with ONLY these changes: Google Translate protection (translate='no', notranslate meta), PWA manifest/icons/SW, React Query, framer-motion page transitions. All offline-specific code has been cleanly removed. One bug was found and fixed: setIsOfflineSession was called but never defined in AuthContext.js. No JavaScript errors detected during testing.
